House Expectations.note: Maintain composure as heir while navigating House Harcourt's rituals, obligations, and scrutiny.

Understand the Awakening.note: Learn what the draconic and fae inheritance changes mean, and how much can be controlled.

Plant your seed.note: Considered magical study options for advancing quest objectives.

Lyra.note: Uncanny, intelligent, amused, dangerous. Ideologically disruptive rather than merely seductive. Her influence is already active.

Marcella.note: Socially fluent foil. Understands performance and appetite as power. Relationship is complicated and watchful.

Elroy.note: Trusted companion and intellectual anchor. Moral counterweight. Witness to who Lavitz actually is beneath performance.

Father (Lord Harcourt).note: Dragonborn patriarch. Embodies one vision of what Lavitz's inheritance means. Pressure and legacy.

Mother (Lady Harcourt).note: Tiefling noblewoman. Embodies a conflicting vision of Lavitz's inheritance. Pressure of a different kind.

known_facts.text: Lavitz is the sole heir to House Harcourt.
His draconic and fae inheritance is already beginning to change him.
The House places heavy pressure on ritual, conduct, and public composure.

recent_major_events.text: The fae gift has already been acquired before the opening scene.
Stage 1 transformation traits are active at story start.

awakening_active.description: Lavitz's transformation and inheritance awakening are currently active narrative pressures.

fae_gift_attuned.description: The fae gift is already bound and relevant to current play.
